innovation_1.name: 基于双掩码与类MRI角度频域分析的物理材质感知机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that explicit physical material perception and geometric consistency are crucial for resolving feature matching ambiguities in complex depth estimation tasks.

innovation_2.name: 多视角几何一致性描述子(GCD)与自适应Mask引导的能量图调整策略
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a comprehensive depth estimation framework that sequentially integrates dual-mask material analysis, adaptive energy map adjustment, and full-angle cost volumes.

innovation_3.name: 基于全角度显式代价体积的MACVO-Net多尺度深度估计架构
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate the superiority of our MACVO-Net through extensive experiments, proving its effectiveness in achieving highly accurate and robust multi-scale depth reconstruction.
